action.reasoning: Observation: iteration 9 command failed because I ran 'python train.py' directly without torchrun, causing DDP init error. No training happened. Analysis: DINOv2 training never executed. Need to run with torchrun --nproc_per_node=4. Time budget 2.27h remains; training 10 epochs DINOv2 (≈65 min) fits. Decision: train DINOv2 ViT‑B/14 for 10 epochs (lr=1e‑4, batch 64/GPU, SWAD start=3) in separate directory, then submit eval with ensemble predict.py (DINOv2 + best CLIP). The CLIP checkpoint (best_model_clip.pt) already exists and will be hard‑loaded by predict.py.
action.command: mkdir -p dinov2_checkpoints && OMP_NUM_THREADS=4 torchrun --nproc_per_node=4 train.py --backbone dinov2_base --epochs 10 --lr 1e-4 --batch_size 64 --num_workers 4 --swa_start 3 --data_dir /data --output_dir dinov2_checkpoints
